output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and demand your money back in 60 seconds for only $19.99.
content_outline: Why Your Landlord Is Withholding Your Security Deposit (And Why It's Often Illegal)
What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct from Your Deposit
State-by-State Deadlines: How Long Does a Landlord Have to Return Your Deposit?
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Actually Works
Get Your Deposit Back Without a Lawyer Using Deposits-Back.com
key_points: Landlords must return deposits within a state-mandated timeframe (usually 14–30 days) and provide an itemized deduction list.
Normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, and pre-existing damage cannot be legally deducted from your security deposit.
A formal demand letter is the fastest, most effective way to recover your deposit before taking legal action.
Deposits-Back.com generates a legally formatted demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee with no signup or subscription required.
output.cta: Stop waiting and begging. Get your legally formatted security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters who have moved out and are dealing with a landlord who is wrongfully withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return a security deposit.

social_hooks.hook_text: Your landlord can ONLY keep your deposit for these 3 things. Everything else is illegal.
social_hooks.video_script: Unpaid rent. Excessive damage beyond normal wear and tear. And broken leases—if the lease says so. That's it. They cannot charge for routine cleaning, carpet wear, or nail holes. If they deducted for that, fight back. Send a dispute letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back dot com. $19.99, no subscription.

If your deductions look sketchy, you need to dispute them in writing—immediately. Deposits-Back dot com writes the letter for you in 60 seconds. One time fee. No signup. Get your money back.
